build.beforeDevCommand: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 1420 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { try { if ((Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 1 http://localhost:1420/).Content -match '/@vite/client') { Write-Host '[beforeDev] Vite already running on http://localhost:1420, skip starting.'; exit 0 } } catch {} ; Write-Error '[beforeDev] Port 1420 is in use but does not look like Vite. Stop the process or change port.'; exit 1 } ; npm run dev --prefix ui; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }"
